lessons.title: First Steps with Python
lessons.description: Display 'Hello, World!' using the print function. Experience your first step in programming.

lessons.title: Variables and Calculations
lessons.description: Store data in variables and perform calculations.

lessons.title: Conditional Branching (if statement)
lessons.description: Learn how to change processing based on conditions.

lessons.title: Loops (for statement)
lessons.description: Learn how to repeat the same process multiple times.
